property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-21.0.7.6-hotspot\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;c:\Users\shifa\AppData\Roaming\Code\User\globalStorage\github.copilot-chat\debugCommand;c:\Users\shifa\AppData\Roaming\Code\User\globalStorage\github.copilot-chat\copilotCli;C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-21.0.7.6-hotspot\bin;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Program Files\Python312\Scripts\;C:\Program Files\Python312\;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\MinGW\bin;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Server 8.0\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\php-8.4.2;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Program Files\MongoDB\Server\8.0.8\bin;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\Users\shifa\Downloads\apache-maven-3.9.12-bin\apache-maven-3.9.12\bin;C:\Users\shifa\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python313\Scripts\;C:\Users\shifa\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python313\;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Shell 8.0\bin\;C:\Users\shifa\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\shifa\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Users\shifa\.dotnet\tools;C:\Users\shifa\.pyenv\pyenv-win\bin;C:\Users\shifa\.pyenv\pyenv-win\shims;C:\Users\shifa\AppData\Roaming\npm;.

testcase.name: runScenario["Add all 3 materials to cart for iPhone 16 Pro", "CaseKaro Shopping Flow"](1)
testcase.system-out:
... ... TestNG 7.9.0 by Cédric Beust (cedric@beust.com) ...
Scenario: Add all 3 materials to cart for iPhone 16 Pro # src/test/resources/features/casekaro.feature:3 Navigated to CaseKaro website Given User navigates to CaseKaro website # stepdefs.CaseKaroSteps.user_navigates_to_casekaro() Clicked on Mobile Covers When User clicks on Mobile Covers # stepdefs.CaseKaroSteps.user_clicks_mobile_covers() Searched for: Apple And User searches for "Apple" # stepdefs.CaseKaroSteps.user_searches_for(java.lang.String) Verified: Samsung is not in results Verified: Vivo is not in results Verified: OnePlus is not in results Verified: Redmi is not in results Verified: Realme is not in results Verified: Oppo is not in results Verified: Moto is not in results Verified: Nokia is not in results Then Other brands should not be visible in search results # stepdefs.CaseKaroSteps.other_brands_not_visible() ✅ Navigated to iPhone 16 Pro collection When User navigates to iPhone 16 Pro collection # stepdefs.CaseKaroSteps.user_navigates_to_iphone16pro() ✅ Opened first product page And User opens the first product page # stepdefs.CaseKaroSteps.user_opens_first_product() Added to cart: Hard And User adds Hard material to cart # stepdefs.CaseKaroSteps.user_adds_hard_to_cart() Added to cart: Soft And User adds Soft material to cart # stepdefs.CaseKaroSteps.user_adds_soft_to_cart() Added to cart: Glass And User adds Glass material to cart # stepdefs.CaseKaroSteps.user_adds_glass_to_cart() ✅ Opened cart page When User opens the cart # stepdefs.CaseKaroSteps.user_opens_cart() All 3 materials found in cart Then Cart should contain all 3 materials # stepdefs.CaseKaroSteps.cart_should_contain_all_materials()
====================================== CART ITEMS DETAILS ======================================
Item 1: Name : Classic Porsche 911 iPhone 16 Pro Back Cover Material : Glass Price : ₹ 249.00 Link : https://casekaro.com/products/classic-porsche-911-iphone-16-pro-back-cover?variant=41955668263030
Item 2: Name : Classic Porsche 911 iPhone 16 Pro Back Cover Material : Black Price : ₹ 149.00 Link : https://casekaro.com/products/classic-porsche-911-iphone-16-pro-back-cover?variant=42318070382710
Item 3: Name : Classic Porsche 911 iPhone 16 Pro Back Cover Material : Hard Price : ₹ 69.00 Link : https://casekaro.com/products/classic-porsche-911-iphone-16-pro-back-cover?variant=41955668197494
Item 4: Name : Classic Porsche 911 iPhone 16 Pro Back Cover Material : Glass Price : ₹ 249.00 Link : https://casekaro.com/products/classic-porsche-911-iphone-16-pro-back-cover?variant=41955668263030
Item 5: Name : Classic Porsche 911 iPhone 16 Pro Back Cover Material : Black Price : ₹ 149.00 Link : https://casekaro.com/products/classic-porsche-911-iphone-16-pro-back-cover?variant=42318070382710
Item 6: Name : Classic Porsche 911 iPhone 16 Pro Back Cover Material : Hard Price : ₹ 69.00 Link : https://casekaro.com/products/classic-porsche-911-iphone-16-pro-back-cover?variant=41955668197494
====================================== All item details printed And User prints all cart item details # stepdefs.CaseKaroSteps.user_prints_cart_details()
testcase.system-err: SLF4J: Failed to load class "org.slf4j.impl.StaticLoggerBinder". SLF4J: Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J: See http://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#StaticLoggerBinder for further details.
